# Runtime Config Contract

Status: Generated
Owner: nova runtime architecture

This file is generated by `scripts/release/generate_runtime_config_contract.py`. Do not edit it by hand.

Canonical sources:
- `packages/nova_file_api/src/nova_file_api/config.py` (`Settings`)
- `scripts/release/runtime_config_contract.py` (curated deploy/template metadata)
- Runtime env vars are derived only from explicit `Settings` `validation_alias` values; `alias` and implicit uppercase fallbacks are invalid
